overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a red-haired character in tribal armor exploring a snowy mountain river environment. The character walks along snow-covered banks, crosses a shallow river, and continues along the rocky shoreline as light snowfall and fog gradually increase, obscuring distant views.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along snow-covered ground toward the river's edge

entered.detail: snow-covered ground with patches of exposed rock and dry grass
clear shallow river with visible rocky bottom and gentle current
steep rocky cliff face covered in snow and ice formations
tall evergreen trees with snow-laden branches
scattered boulders along the river's edge dusted with snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered riverbank with a steep cliff to the left and scattered pine trees to the right. The river lies ahead, bordered by snow-dusted rocks, under an overcast winter sky.

events.description: character steps from snow-covered bank into shallow river water, creating splashes
character exits the river onto the opposite rocky shore

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep river water with visible ripples and splashes around the legs

entered.detail: submerged and partially exposed rocks in the riverbed
snow-capped mountain peak visible through the haze across the river

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow river, wading through clear water that ripples around their legs. Snow-covered rocks are visible beneath the surface and along the banks, while a distant mountain peak emerges in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking along the snow-dusted rocky shoreline beside the flowing river

entered.detail: uneven rocky terrain with patches of snow and exposed stone

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the river, the character walks along a rocky shoreline with the river now flowing to their right. The terrain is uneven with snow patches, and pine trees dot the landscape ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain riverside with ancient ruins

events.description: snowfall intensifies and fog rolls in, significantly reducing visibility of distant terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the river path through heavy snowfall and fog, approaching distant landmarks

entered.detail: massive tilted rock outcropping with red markings visible on its face
faint outlines of buildings or ruins visible through the fog across the river

segments.scene_description: As fog and snowfall intensify, visibility drops significantly. The character walks past a distinctive large rock formation with red markings, while mysterious distant structures become barely visible through the white haze across the river.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy river valley that gradually descends into a dense, obscuring winter haze. It begins with the character walking along a snow-covered riverbank between a steep cliff and scattered pine trees under an overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts as they wade into the shallow, clear water of the river, revealing submerged rocks and a distant mountain peak. The camera then follows the character onto a rocky, uneven shoreline with the river flowing to the right, moving past patches of snow and pine trees. Finally, the environment transforms as snowfall and fog intensify, dropping visibility and blurring the landscape until only a large rock with red markings and mysterious, distant structures are barely visible through the white haze.
